title: Cinnamon
description: A simple yet unique 16x resource pack!
body:
![A fancy box with a sienna background and gold trim containing a pumpkin pie on the left of a pixelated word: Cinnamon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe077af8fdf0133cb1c8f3b834ae7d8b0f06b15.png)

Have you ever wanted Minecraft to look like _that_?

...

No?

...

Well me neither, but now it looks like _this_!

...

_(Check the gallery tab if you want images, unless you would prefer to stay with me — the amazing and omniscient narrator!)_

Anyways, this is a resource pack that _improves_ (to me at least) certain visual aspects of the game, and providing several helpful — others purely for decoration — features.

Anything seen in this resource pack will maybe, probably, _most likely_, **definitely** change, as I spend _way_ to much time making textures.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Cinnamon now has a trailer, albeit a bad one, but still, it has a trailer!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/r-BkZpqQp9U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[![Pixelated Discord logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c3c4883ed5f683fac67db0f615929ebd24bad0a.png)](https://discord.gg/jbBRwbE7VH)

By the way, Cinnamon now has a 
[Discord server](https://discord.gg/jbBRwbE7VH) where you can post feedback and inform me of any bugs!

<details>
<summary>Terms and Conditions</summary>

![A wooded sign with the text: "Terms" in a black ink. It is being held up by two iron chains connected to a log.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b4052084b8b3dba1a6b52d9b4bdd346dcce9e11.png)

### You may:
- Recommend this pack to anyone as the greatest pack ever.
- Alter some of my textures, but for your own use only.
- Use this pack in your videos, as long as it's credited.
### You may not:
- Repost my work, claiming it as your own.
- Use my assets in your resource pack.

</details>
